Please provide average duration statistics for our scheduled vulnerability scans.
avg vuln scan duration

base_question: Were there any scanner connectivity issues today?
variants: any scanner connectivity issues today?
Please identify any scanner connectivity problems that have occurred today.
scanner connectivity issues today

base_question: Generate the Friday end-of-week security report
variants: generate the friday end of week report
Please generate the end-of-week security summary report for Friday distribution.
friday EOW report

base_question: How did our security metrics change this month?
variants: what security metrics changed this month?
Please summarize how our key security metrics have changed during the current month.
monthly security metrics delta

base_question: Show me the top 10 most common vulnerabilities across our environment
variants: what are the top 10 vulns we see all over the place?
Please identify the ten most common vulnerabilities detected across our environment.
top 10 common vulns

base_question: Are all our cloud connectors healthy and syncing?
variants: are our cloud connectors all syncing properly?
Please verify that all cloud connectors are healthy and synchronizing data as expected.
cloud connector sync status

base_question: What's the end-of-day security summary?
variants: give me the end of day security summary
Please generate a summary of security events, findings, and metrics for the end of the current business day.
EOD security summary

base_question: Show me any scans that exceeded their time window
variants: any scans that ran over their time window?
Please identify vulnerability scans that exceeded their allotted execution time window.
scans over time window

base_question: Give me a high-level security overview for the board presentation
variants: for the board presentation I need a high-level security overview
Please produce a high-level security overview document suitable for presentation to the board of directors.
board-level security overview
